summary: fix(deps): complete stylelint 17 migration (scss config + rule cleanup)
description:
Because:
 - The stylelint 17 bump alone left stylelint-config-recommended-scss at v14
   (stylelint-scss@6, peer stylelint ^16), which stylelint 17 does not satisfy,
   and the config referenced scss/at-import-partial-extension, removed in
   stylelint-scss 7. stylelint runs only at pre-commit, so CI did not catch it.

This commit:
 - Bumps stylelint-config-recommended-scss to ^17.0.1 (stylelint-scss@7, peer ^17).
 - Removes deprecated stylelint-config-prettier (obsolete since stylelint 15).
 - Drops the removed scss/at-import-partial-extension rule (was disabled).
 - Verified: immutable-clean lockfile, no stylelint peer warnings, config loads
   with no unknown-rule/plugin errors under stylelint 17.
